features.description: Create Cargo project structure and define the git-zcrypt CLI with all planned subcommands stubbed.
features.validation: cargo test; subcommands are accepted by the parser and return controlled stub errors until implemented

features.description: Implement .git/git-zcrypt key-store discovery, key-name validation, and init directory creation.
features.validation: cargo test key_store; init creates .git/git-zcrypt/keys in a temporary git repository

features.description: Implement generate-key, import-key, and export-key for exactly 32-byte raw keys.
features.validation: cargo test key_store; invalid key lengths fail and exported generated keys are 32 bytes

features.description: Implement deterministic zlib/deflate compression and decompression helpers for arbitrary bytes.
features.validation: cargo test compression; empty and binary inputs round trip

features.description: Implement strict encode/decode for the GZC1 versioned encrypted blob format.
features.validation: cargo test blob; malformed magic, version, lengths, and reserved fields are rejected

features.description: Implement ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption/decryption with OS-backed random 96-bit nonces and authenticated metadata.
features.validation: cargo test crypto; tampered ciphertext or metadata fails to decrypt

features.description: Implement binary stdin/stdout clean and smudge filters that compose compression, blob format, and encryption.
features.validation: cargo test --test filter_roundtrip; arbitrary binary bytes and empty input round trip

features.description: Implement install-filter and status using local Git configuration for filter.git-zcrypt.
features.validation: cargo test git_config; temporary repository config contains clean, smudge, and required settings

features.description: Add README setup instructions, .gitattributes examples, and key safety warnings.
features.validation: README includes init, key generation/import/export, install-filter, .gitattributes, backup, and history warnings

features.description: Run formatting, tests, and a manual temporary-repository smoke test for the Git filter flow.
features.validation: cargo fmt; cargo test; manual git clean/smudge smoke test succeeds
